svg.title: Discord Quran RAG Bot – System Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing Discord user flowing through Discord bot into a RAG pipeline with retrieve_context, build_prompt, and rag_answer stages, backed by an embedding model, chapter cache, Google Gemini LLM with GLM-5 fallback, Supabase DB with tables and RPC functions, and an observability stack of FastAPI, Prometheus, and React dashboard — all inside Docker.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Discord user interact with the Quran RAG bot?')
sendPrompt('How does bot.py handle Discord slash commands and UI components?')
sendPrompt('Explain how retrieve_context performs concurrent multi-source retrieval')
sendPrompt('How does build_prompt construct the structured LLM prompt?')
sendPrompt('How does rag_answer call Gemini and handle the fallback to GLM-5?')
sendPrompt('What is the nomic-embed-text-v1 embedding model used for?')
sendPrompt('How does the chapter titles cache work and why is it cached?')
sendPrompt('How does Google Gemini generate answers from the RAG prompt?')
sendPrompt('What is the GLM-5 HuggingFace fallback LLM and when is it used?')
sendPrompt('What tables are stored in Supabase for the Quran RAG bot?')
sendPrompt('How do the Supabase RPC functions perform cosine similarity search?')
sendPrompt('What Prometheus metrics does the FastAPI server expose?')
sendPrompt('What does Prometheus monitor in the Discord RAG bot?')
sendPrompt('What does the React metrics dashboard visualize?')
